navigation_overview: Parabank is a sample banking application. When visitors arrive, they see the sign-in page, which offers an Email / Username and Password form, a Register link for new customers, and a Forgot Password? link for credential recovery. After a successful log-in, users reach their account dashboard displaying every account and balance. The left-hand navigation menu now contains the following options: ① Accounts Overview (default dashboard view), ② Open New Account, ③ Transfer Funds, ④ Bill Pay, ⑤ Request Loan, ⑥ Update Contact Info, ⑦ Manage Cards, ⑧ Investments, ⑨ Account Statements, ⑩ Security Settings, ⑪ Support Center, and ⑫ Log Out.

module_summaries.summary:
Users can sign in with Email/Username and Password or use the Forgot Password link to initiate recovery.
Shows authentication validation feedback and success/error messages (e.g., "Signed in successfully.") and input validation hints.

Users can create a new customer account by submitting required personal, contact, and credential information via the registration form.
Shows field-level validation feedback, formatted inputs (phone/ZIP), and confirmation on successful registration or error messages.

Users can view an accounts dashboard listing all their customer accounts and (nominally) click account numbers for details.
Shows a table of accounts with masked account numbers, account type, current balance, account status badges, open dates, and a footer total balance.

Users can open a new Checking or Savings account by selecting type, entering an initial deposit, choosing a funding source, and submitting the form.
Shows account-type minimums, real-time validation errors, funding account balances and sufficiency, and a success confirmation with new account details.

Users can transfer funds internally between their Checking/Savings or externally by selecting transfer type, source, destination, and amount then submitting the transfer.
Shows source account balances (filtered to Checking/Savings), destination entry fields, validation errors, and transfer confirmation or failure messages.

Users can submit bill payments by entering payee details, payee account (and confirmation), payment amount and source account then executing the payment.
Shows validation errors, payment confirmation with reference code, updated source account balance, and payment error messages when applicable.

Users can apply for Personal, Auto, or Home loans by selecting a loan type, entering loan and down payment amounts, and choosing a collateral account.
Shows interest rates, allowed loan ranges, validation errors, simulated approval/denial results, and approved loan details on success.

Users can edit and update their contact/profile information (name, address, phone) using the pre-filled form and submit changes.
Shows current pre-filled profile data, inline validation errors, an inline error banner for failures, and a success message when updates are saved.

Users can request new debit/credit cards by providing card type, linked account and shipping address, and can manage existing cards' limits, travel notices, and status.
Shows accounts available to link, card request confirmations with tracking IDs, a list of existing cards with status (Active/Frozen) and current spending limits.

Users can view a read-only portfolio snapshot and execute fund trades (Buy or Sell) by selecting action, fund symbol, quantity and account then executing the trade.
Shows current holdings, market value, unrealised gain/loss, symbol autocomplete suggestions, buying power and trade confirmations or validation errors.

Users can generate account statements for a chosen period and account, and toggle/save e-statement (paperless) preferences.
Shows selectable accounts, retrieved transactions for the generated statement, generation success/error messages, and saved paperless preference and email.

Users can change their account password by entering current password and a new strong password (with confirmation) and submitting the change.
Shows password-strength/validation feedback, field-level validation errors, and success or failure messages after attempting the password change.

Users can send secure support messages (with optional attachments) or request scheduled callbacks by submitting the appropriate form with subject, category or callback details.
Shows pre-filled phone number, category selection, validation errors, and confirmation with ticket ID or callback request details on success.

test_cases.title: Sign in with valid registered email and password
test_cases.preconditions: A registered user account exists with a valid email and password
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username, Password) using the registered user's email and valid password
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: User is signed in and redirected to the Accounts Overview page

test_cases.title: Incorrect credentials show error, clear password, and allow retry
test_cases.preconditions: A registered user account exists
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username, Password) using a registered user's email and an incorrect password
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Error message is displayed, the password field is cleared, and the user can attempt to sign in again
test_cases.spec_evidence: Incorrect email or password. Please try again,

test_cases.title: Post-logout navigation to protected page redirects to login
test_cases.preconditions: Tester has a valid user account and can log in
steps: Log in with valid credentials
Navigate to a protected page (e.g., Accounts Overview)
Click the application's Logout button/link
After logout, attempt to navigate to the previously-open protected page by entering its URL or clicking its link
test_cases.expected_result: The application redirects to the login page (or shows the login prompt) instead of displaying the protected page

test_cases.title: Browser back button after logout does not restore authenticated content
test_cases.preconditions: Tester has a valid user account and can log in
steps: Log in with valid credentials
Open a protected page with sensitive content (e.g., Accounts Overview)
Click the application's Logout button/link
Click the browser Back button once or twice
test_cases.expected_result: The browser does not show cached authenticated content; the user is shown the login page or a non-authenticated view and no sensitive data is visible

test_cases.title: Session expiry during form entry forces login or shows expiry notice
test_cases.preconditions: Tester has a valid user account and can log in; tester can modify session (clear cookies) or wait for configured session timeout
steps: Log in with valid credentials and navigate to a multi-field authenticated form (e.g., Transfer Funds)
Begin entering data into the form but do not submit
Simulate session expiry by either waiting the configured timeout or clearing the session cookie/session storage via browser devtools
Attempt to submit the form or refresh the page
test_cases.expected_result: The application either shows a session-expired notice and/or redirects to the login page before processing the submission; the form data is not processed while the session is expired

test_cases.title: After changing password, old password no longer authenticates
test_cases.preconditions: Tester has a valid user account and can log in; tester knows current and new passwords to perform a change
steps: Log in with the current password and navigate to the password-change page (Security Settings)
Change the password to a new value and save the change
Log out, then attempt to log in using the old (pre-change) password
test_cases.expected_result: Login with the old password fails (authentication denied) and only the new password succeeds

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for required fields and sign-in is not attempted
test_cases.spec_evidence: Email/Username is required

test_cases.title: Sign in fails with invalid email format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username, Password) using an invalid email format and a valid password
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for email format and sign-in is not attempted
test_cases.spec_evidence: Email must be a valid email format

test_cases.title: Sign in fails when password does not meet complexity requirements
test_cases.preconditions: A registered user account exists
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username, Password) using the registered user's email and a password that does not meet the stated complexity requirements
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for password complexity and sign-in is not completed
test_cases.spec_evidence: password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

test_cases.title: Sign in fails when password is shorter than the minimum length
test_cases.preconditions: A registered user account exists
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username, Password) using the registered user's email and a password that is shorter than the required minimum length
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for password length and sign-in is not completed
test_cases.spec_evidence: password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

test_cases.title: Refreshing an authenticated page preserves the logged-in session
test_cases.preconditions: Tester has a valid user account and can log in
steps: Log in with valid credentials
Navigate to an authenticated page (e.g., Accounts Overview)
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser reload)
test_cases.expected_result: The user remains authenticated after the refresh and the protected content (e.g., account list/balances) remains visible without requiring re-login

test_cases.title: Password reset link expires after stated duration and shows error
test_cases.preconditions: Tester can request password reset for a known account and knows the application's stated reset-link expiry duration
steps: Go to the application's forgot-password page and request a password reset for a valid account
Obtain the reset link (from email or test inbox) and wait until the application's stated expiry duration has elapsed (or use a test/admin method to mark the link as expired)
Open the expired reset link in the browser
test_cases.expected_result: The application shows a clear error indicating the reset link has expired (or redirects to an expired-link page) and does not allow setting a new password using the expired link

test_cases.title: Forgot-password shows error for an unregistered email
test_cases.preconditions: Tester is on the forgot-password page
steps: Open the forgot-password page
Enter an email address that is not registered in the system (use a clearly unregistered test email) and submit the request
test_cases.expected_result: The application displays a clear error or message indicating the email is not registered (not a silent success) and does not send a reset link

test_cases.title: Sign in with password that exactly meets minimum complexity boundary
test_cases.preconditions: A registered user account exists
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username, Password) using the registered user's email and a password that exactly meets the minimum length and includes required character types
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: User is signed in and redirected to the Accounts Overview page
test_cases.spec_evidence: password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

test_cases.title: Register successfully with valid required fields (5-digit ZIP)
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code in 5-digit format, Phone Number, SSN, Username as a valid email, Password meeting length, Confirm Password matching)
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Displays "Account created successfully — please sign in," and redirects to the login page.

test_cases.title: Phone Number and SSN are auto-formatted on input
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields, entering unformatted digits for Phone Number and SSN
Move focus out of the Phone Number and SSN fields (or click another field) to trigger formatting
test_cases.expected_result: Phone Number displays as (123) 456-7890 and SSN displays as 123-45-6789 before submission.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System validates field completeness, pattern conformance, and password match on submission

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid username (not an email)
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, entering a non-email string into the Username field
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the username must be a valid email format.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Username must be a valid email format

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid phone number format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, entering an incorrectly formatted Phone Number
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating phone number format is invalid.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Phone Number must follow the format (123) 456-7890 with automatic formatting

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid SSN format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, entering an incorrectly formatted SSN
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating SSN format is invalid.
test_cases.spec_evidence: SSN must follow the format 123-45-6789 with automatic formatting

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid ZIP code format
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, entering a ZIP Code that is not 5 digits or 5+4 format
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating ZIP Code format is invalid.
test_cases.spec_evidence: ZIP Code must be 5 digits or 5+4 format (12345 or 12345-6789)

test_cases.title: Submit with password shorter than minimum length
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, entering a Password shorter than the minimum length and matching Confirm Password
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating password does not meet the minimum length requirement.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters

test_cases.title: Submit with Confirm Password not matching Password
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, entering different values in Password and Confirm Password
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Confirm Password must match the Password field.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Confirm Password must match the Password field

test_cases.title: Register with Password exactly at minimum length
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, using a Password that is exactly the minimum allowed length and matching Confirm Password
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Account is created successfully and user is redirected to the login page.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters

test_cases.title: Dashboard shows welcome message with user's name
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is visible.
steps: Observe the welcome message area on the dashboard
Verify the message contains the logged-in user's display name
test_cases.expected_result: Welcome message displays the user's name.

test_cases.title: Each account row displays required fields including Active badge
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is visible.
steps: Inspect each row in the accounts table
Verify each row shows Account Number (masked), Account Type, Current Balance, Account Status (Active badge), and Open Date
test_cases.expected_result: All rows display the listed fields and show an Active badge in the status column.

test_cases.title: Account numbers are masked showing only last four digits
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is visible.
steps: Inspect the Account Number cell in one or more account rows
Verify the account number displays only its last four digits with preceding characters masked
test_cases.expected_result: Account numbers display a masked format with only the last four digits visible.

test_cases.title: Account rows are ordered by creation date (earliest first)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is visible.
steps: Note the Open Date values for each row in the accounts table
Verify the rows are ordered from earliest to latest open date (earliest first)
test_cases.expected_result: Rows appear in ascending order by open date, with the earliest account listed first.

test_cases.title: Footer displays total balance equal to sum of row balances
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is visible.
steps: Record the Current Balance values for all account rows
Compare the sum of those balances to the footer total balance displayed
test_cases.expected_result: Footer total equals the sum of all Current Balance values shown in the table.

test_cases.title: Direct URL access while logged out redirects to login (Accounts Overview)
test_cases.preconditions: Tester is logged out (no active session/cookies for the app)
steps: Open the browser and ensure no active session (clear cookies or use a private window)
Enter the direct URL for Accounts Overview (the application's Accounts Overview page) in the address bar and go
test_cases.expected_result: The application redirects to the login page (HTTP 302 or UI redirect) and does not display the Accounts Overview content without authentication

test_cases.title: Clicking Account Number does not open details (clickable but not implemented)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is visible.
steps: Click the Account Number link in an account row
Observe whether an account detail page opens or the dashboard remains visible
test_cases.expected_result: Clicking the Account Number does not navigate to an account detail page and the dashboard remains displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account Number is clickable but not implemented yet

test_cases.title: Open a new Checking account with valid inputs
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page.
steps: Select the Checking account type card
Fill all required fields (Initial Deposit Amount that meets the selected account's minimum, Funding Source Account with sufficient balance)
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Shows "Account opened successfully!" and redirects to accounts overview.

test_cases.title: Reject account creation when funding source has insufficient balance
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page.
steps: Select any account type
Fill all required fields with an Initial Deposit Amount that meets the selected account's minimum, select a Funding Source Account that does not have sufficient balance
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the funding source lacks sufficient balance and account is not created.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Funding Source Account must have sufficient balance

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation errors are shown when validations fail

test_cases.title: Initial Deposit field rejects non-numeric input
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page.
steps: Select any account type
Fill all other required fields with valid values, enter a non-numeric value into Initial Deposit Amount
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the initial deposit must be numeric and account is not created.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must be numeric

test_cases.title: Reject Checking account creation when deposit is below Checking minimum
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page.
steps: Select the Checking account type card
Fill all other required fields, enter an Initial Deposit Amount below the required minimum for the selected account type
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the initial deposit does not meet the minimum and account is not created.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must meet minimums ($25 for Checking, $100 for Savings)

test_cases.title: Open account when Initial Deposit is exactly the required minimum for Checking
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page.
steps: Select the Checking account type card
Fill all required fields with an Initial Deposit Amount exactly equal to the minimum required for the selected account type and choose a Funding Source Account with sufficient balance
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Shows "Account opened successfully!" and redirects to accounts overview.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must meet minimums ($25 for Checking, $100 for Savings)

test_cases.title: Real-time validation displays errors for invalid Initial Deposit entry
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page.
steps: Enter an invalid value into Initial Deposit Amount (non-numeric or below the account-type minimum) without clicking "Open Account"
Observe validation messages displayed near the Initial Deposit field
test_cases.expected_result: Real-time validation error message is displayed for the Initial Deposit field.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Displays real-time validation errors

test_cases.title: Complete an internal transfer successfully
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in, on the Transfer Funds page, and has two own accounts with sufficient available balance.
steps: Select transfer type "My ParaBank Account"
Fill all required fields (Source Account: choose one own account, Destination Account: choose a different own account, Transfer Amount: valid amount less than or equal to available balance)
Click "Transfer"
test_cases.expected_result: "Transfer completed successfully." message is shown with a transaction ID and account balances are updated accordingly.

test_cases.title: Successful external transfer to an external account
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and has a Checking or Savings account with sufficient funds.
steps: Select transfer type "External Account"
Select a source account from the Source Account dropdown
Fill all required fields (External account number, Confirm account number, Transfer Amount)
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer completed successfully. A transaction ID is displayed.

test_cases.title: Source Account dropdown shows only Checking and Savings accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User has multiple accounts including Checking and Savings.
steps: Click the Source Account dropdown
Verify only Checking and Savings accounts are listed as selectable options
test_cases.expected_result: Only Checking and Savings accounts are available as source accounts.

test_cases.title: Transfer fails when insufficient funds in source account
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in, on the Transfer Funds page, and the chosen source account has a known available balance.
steps: Select transfer type "My ParaBank Account"
Fill all required fields with a Transfer Amount greater than the source account's available balance
Click "Transfer"
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer is rejected and a contextual error indicating insufficient funds is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates sufficient funds

test_cases.title: External transfer fails when source account has insufficient funds
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Transfer Funds page and the selected source account balance is less than the transfer amount.
steps: Select a source account with insufficient balance
Fill all other required fields (External account number, Confirm account number, Transfer Amount greater than available balance)
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Error displayed indicating insufficient funds.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates sufficient funds

test_cases.title: Destination options update when transfer type is My ParaBank Account
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in, on the Transfer Funds page, and has multiple own accounts.
steps: Select transfer type "My ParaBank Account"
Open the Destination Account dropdown and inspect the options
test_cases.expected_result: Destination options list the user's own accounts appropriate for an internal transfer.

test_cases.title: Destination options update when External Account transfer type is selected
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Transfer Funds page.
steps: Select transfer type "External Account"
Verify the destination options reflect external transfer fields (account number and confirmation fields are shown)
test_cases.expected_result: Destination options update to require external account details.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and on the Transfer Funds page.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Transfer"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates transfer amount

test_cases.title: Transfer rejected when destination account is not one of the user's accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and on the Transfer Funds page.
steps: Select transfer type "My ParaBank Account"
Select a Source Account (user-owned), select a Destination Account that is not owned by the user
Fill Transfer Amount with a valid amount and click "Transfer"
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer is rejected and a contextual error such as "Account numbers do not match." is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account numbers do not match.

test_cases.title: External transfer fails when account numbers do not match
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Transfer Funds page with transfer type set to External Account.
steps: Fill all required fields with a valid transfer amount and a source account, enter an external account number and a different confirmation account number
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Error displayed: "Account numbers do not match."
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account numbers do not match.

test_cases.title: Reject transfer with invalid transfer amount
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Transfer Funds page and transfer type is set to External Account.
steps: Fill all other required fields (External account number, Confirm account number, Source Account), enter an invalid transfer amount
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the transfer amount is invalid.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates transfer amount

test_cases.title: Transfer of exact available balance succeeds
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in, on the Transfer Funds page, and the source account has a positive available balance.
steps: Select transfer type "My ParaBank Account"
Fill all required fields with Transfer Amount equal to the source account's available balance
Click "Transfer"
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer completes successfully with a transaction ID and the source account available balance is reduced to zero.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates sufficient funds

test_cases.title: Submit payment with valid data
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Submit Payment page and source account has sufficient available funds.
steps: Fill all required fields (Payee Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number, Payee Account Number, Confirm Account Number, Payment Amount, Source Account) with valid values
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Displays "Payment submitted successfully." with a reference code and the account balances are updated.

test_cases.title: Submit payment when source account has insufficient funds
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Submit Payment page and source account has insufficient available funds.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values where Payment Amount exceeds the source account's available funds
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error "Insufficient funds" displayed, payment is not processed and balances remain unchanged.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Displays "Insufficient funds" inline

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Submit Payment page.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and errors are displayed inline.
test_cases.spec_evidence: All entries are validated

test_cases.title: Submit with mismatched payee account numbers
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Submit Payment page.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, set Payee Account Number and Confirm Account Number to different values
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error "Account numbers do not match" shown and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Displays "Account numbers do not match" inline

test_cases.title: Submit payment equal to available funds (boundary)
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Submit Payment page and source account has available funds equal to the intended payment amount.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, set Payment Amount equal to the source account's available funds
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Payment is accepted, confirmation with reference code is shown and the source account balance is updated accordingly (reduced to zero).
test_cases.spec_evidence: Available funds are checked

test_cases.title: Form remains editable after inline validation error
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Submit Payment page.
steps: Fill all required fields except leave one required field empty
Click "Pay" to trigger inline validation error
Modify a field value in the form
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error is shown and the form fields remain editable for correction.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Form remains editable after errors

test_cases.title: Request loan approved and created successfully
test_cases.preconditions: User is on Request Loan page
steps: Select the desired loan type card (Personal, Auto, or Home)
Fill all required fields (Loan Amount within the selected type's valid range, Down Payment meeting minimum and less than Loan Amount, select a Collateral Account meeting collateral rules)
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Success message 'Loan approved and created successfully!' is shown and the new loan account details are displayed.

test_cases.title: Reject when collateral account does not provide sufficient collateral value
test_cases.preconditions: User is on Request Loan page
steps: Select the loan type card
Fill all required fields with valid Loan Amount and Down Payment and select a Collateral Account with insufficient funds relative to required collateral percentage
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Application is denied with a reason indicating inadequate collateral value.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Inadequate collateral value.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is on Request Loan page
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System validates amount ranges

test_cases.title: Reject when Down Payment is below the 10% minimum requirement
test_cases.preconditions: User is on Request Loan page
steps: Select the loan type card
Fill all required fields with a valid Loan Amount but a Down Payment below the minimum percentage
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the down payment does not meet the minimum percentage requirement.
test_cases.spec_evidence: 10% minimum down payment requirement

test_cases.title: Loan application denied for insufficient credit history shows denial reason
test_cases.preconditions: User is on Request Loan page and the system will return a credit denial for this submission
steps: Select the loan type card
Fill all required fields with valid Loan Amount, Down Payment, and Collateral
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Application is denied and the denial message includes 'Insufficient credit history'.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Insufficient credit history

test_cases.title: No actual balance debits occur after loan creation
test_cases.preconditions: User is on Request Loan page and the collateral account balance is displayed
steps: Note the displayed collateral account balance
Fill all required fields for a valid loan application and click "Submit"
Verify success message and confirm the displayed collateral account balance is unchanged
test_cases.expected_result: Loan is created and the collateral account balance shown on the page remains unchanged.
test_cases.spec_evidence: In this mock system, no actual balance debits occur

test_cases.title: Request personal loan with amount at the minimum permitted boundary
test_cases.preconditions: User is on Request Loan page
steps: Select the Personal loan type card
Fill all required fields with Loan Amount exactly at the Personal loan minimum, valid Down Payment, and sufficient Collateral
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Application proceeds without a loan-amount range validation error (amount accepted for processing).
test_cases.spec_evidence: Loan Amount field with type-specific ranges

test_cases.title: Update profile with valid changes
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Update Profile page is open.
steps: Verify the form fields are pre-filled with existing values (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number)
Modify one or more fields with valid new values
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: Success message "Profile updated successfully." appears and the form refreshes to show the updated contact information.

test_cases.title: Profile form is pre-filled with existing contact data
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Update Profile page is open.
steps: Observe the form fields (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number)
test_cases.expected_result: Each field is pre-filled with the user's current contact information.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Update Profile page is open.
steps: Clear all required fields (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number)
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and an inline error banner is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Submission triggers validation of each entry (format and completeness)

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid ZIP Code format
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Update Profile page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter an invalid format in the ZIP Code field
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: ZIP Code field is highlighted as invalid and an inline error banner is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Submission triggers validation of each entry (format and completeness)

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid Phone Number format
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Update Profile page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter an invalid format in the Phone Number field
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: Phone Number field is highlighted as invalid and an inline error banner is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Submission triggers validation of each entry (format and completeness)

test_cases.title: Request a Debit card successfully
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Request Card page is open
steps: Select Debit as Card Type
Select an account to link
Fill all required fields (complete Shipping Address)
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: Confirmation shown: "Card request submitted successfully." with a tracking ID and a card-request ticket is opened.

test_cases.title: Add travel notice only with a valid date range and destinations
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is selectable in the "Select Existing Card" dropdown.
steps: Select an existing card from the "Select Existing Card" dropdown
Fill Travel Notice dates and destinations with a valid date range and destination values, leave New Spending Limit empty or unchanged
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Shows "Card controls updated successfully." and the travel notice is saved for the selected card.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Request Card page is open
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and the request is not submitted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System checks that the address is complete

test_cases.title: Submit with incomplete shipping address
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Request Card page is open
steps: Select a Card Type and select an account to link
Fill shipping address with missing or incomplete address fields
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the shipping address is incomplete and the request is not submitted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System checks that the address is complete

test_cases.title: Submit when the selected account is not in good standing
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and the Request Card page is open; an account exists that is not in good standing
steps: Select a Card Type
Select the account that is not in good standing
Fill all required fields (complete Shipping Address)
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is rejected with an error indicating the account cannot be used; no card-request ticket is opened.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System verifies the selected account's standing

test_cases.title: Set new spending limit above policy triggers inline validation
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is selectable in the "Select Existing Card" dropdown.
steps: Select an existing card from the "Select Existing Card" dropdown
Fill all required fields (New Spending Limit with an amount above the policy limit)
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating the spending limit exceeds policy and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Limits above policy cause validation failures

test_cases.title: Enter travel notice with start date after end date shows date-range validation error
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is selectable in the "Select Existing Card" dropdown.
steps: Select an existing card from the "Select Existing Card" dropdown
Fill Travel Notice dates with a start date later than the end date and provide destinations as needed
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error for the travel notice date range and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Date ranges are validated

test_cases.title: Attempt a disallowed card status transition shows validation error
test_cases.preconditions: Selected card is in a status that disallows the attempted transition.
steps: Select the card in the status described by the precondition from the "Select Existing Card" dropdown
Set Card Status to the disallowed target status
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating the status transition is not allowed and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Allowable card-status transitions are validated

test_cases.title: Submit with limit above policy and invalid travel dates shows multiple inline errors
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is selectable in the "Select Existing Card" dropdown.
steps: Select an existing card from the "Select Existing Card" dropdown
Fill all required fields (New Spending Limit above policy and Travel Notice with start date after end date)
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Multiple inline validation errors are shown for the spending limit and the travel date range; the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation failures (for example, a limit above policy) appear inline, and the form stays editable

test_cases.title: Set spending limit exactly at policy maximum is accepted
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is selectable in the "Select Existing Card" dropdown.
steps: Select an existing card from the "Select Existing Card" dropdown
Fill New Spending Limit with an amount exactly equal to the policy maximum
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Controls update successfully and show confirmation without validation errors.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Limits above policy cause validation failures

test_cases.title: Execute a same-day buy order updates holdings and shows confirmation
test_cases.preconditions: User has sufficient buying power in the selected funding account.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action = Buy, Fund Symbol via autocomplete, Quantity, Funding Account)
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: A same-day trade is executed; confirmation 'Trade executed successfully.' with an order ID is displayed and portfolio holdings are updated to reflect the purchase.

test_cases.title: Create a recurring investment plan with Weekly frequency
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Create Plan form is visible.
steps: Fill all required fields (Fund Symbol, a valid Contribution Amount meeting minimum, Frequency = Weekly, a valid future Start Date, a Funding Account with adequate balance)
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Schedule is stored and confirmation message "Plan created successfully." is displayed.

test_cases.title: Portfolio snapshot is read-only and displays holdings and valuations
test_cases.preconditions: User has existing investments in the portfolio.
steps: Observe the portfolio snapshot panel
test_cases.expected_result: The portfolio snapshot is read-only and shows current fund holdings, market value, and unrealised gain or loss.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown inline for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation failures appear inline

test_cases.title: Submit trade with an unrecognized fund symbol
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with an invalid/unrecognized Fund Symbol via the autocomplete, valid Quantity, and select Funding/Destination Account
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating the symbol does not exist is displayed and the trade is not submitted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system checks that the symbol exists

test_cases.title: Attempt to buy when funding account has insufficient buying power
test_cases.preconditions: Selected funding account has insufficient buying power.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action = Buy, Fund Symbol via autocomplete, Quantity exceeding buying power, Funding Account)
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating insufficient buying power is displayed and the trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Customer has sufficient buying power or share balance

test_cases.title: Attempt to sell more shares than held in portfolio
test_cases.preconditions: Portfolio holding for the fund has fewer shares than requested.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action = Sell, Fund Symbol via autocomplete, Quantity greater than holding, Destination Account)
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating insufficient share balance is displayed and the trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Customer has sufficient buying power or share balance

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Create Plan form is visible.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and problematic fields are highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Errors highlight the problematic fields

test_cases.title: Reject plan when Contribution amount is below minimum
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Create Plan form is visible.
steps: Fill all required fields (Fund Symbol, a Contribution Amount below the minimum, Frequency, a valid future Start Date, a Funding Account with adequate balance)
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for Contribution Amount indicating it does not meet the minimum and the field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Contribution meets the minimum

test_cases.title: Attempt to execute trade with quantity set to zero
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with Quantity set to zero and valid values for other fields
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating quantity must be greater than zero and the trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Quantity is greater than zero

test_cases.title: Start Date equals today is rejected (boundary)
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Create Plan form is visible.
steps: Fill all required fields (Fund Symbol, a valid Contribution Amount meeting minimum, Frequency, Start Date set to today, a Funding Account with adequate balance)
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for Start Date indicating it must be in the future and the field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Start date is in the future

test_cases.title: Contribution amount exactly equals minimum is accepted (boundary)
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Create Plan form is visible.
steps: Fill all required fields (Fund Symbol, Contribution Amount equal to the stated minimum, Frequency, a valid future Start Date, a Funding Account with adequate balance)
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Schedule is stored and confirmation message "Plan created successfully." is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Contribution meets the minimum

test_cases.title: Generate statement for selected account using custom date range
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Account Statements page is open.
steps: Select the target Account from the Account dropdown and set Statement Period to a custom start and end date
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Statement generated successfully and the statement shows transactions retrieved for the specified date range and account.

test_cases.title: Save e-statement preference with valid email and verify persistence
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Account Statements Save Preference section is open.
steps: Check the paperless statements checkbox
Fill a valid email address in the Email Address field
Click "Save Preference"
test_cases.expected_result: Displays "e-Statement preference updated." and the paperless preference is saved (checkbox remains selected and the Email Address persists).

test_cases.title: Save statement preference with a valid email address
test_cases.workflow: Save Preference (the system validates the email address)
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Account Statements Save Preference form is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Email address) with a valid email address
Click "Save"
test_cases.expected_result: Success confirmation is displayed and the saved email address is shown in the preference field.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Account Statements page is open.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for required fields and statement is not generated.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates the dates

test_cases.title: Generate statement with start date after end date
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Account Statements page is open.
steps: Select an Account and set Statement Period to a custom range where Start Date is after End Date
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating invalid date range is displayed and statement is not generated.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates the dates

test_cases.title: Handle backend failure during statement generation
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and Account Statements page is open.
steps: Select an Account and a valid Statement Period
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Error message 'Unable to generate statement — please try again later.' is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Unable to generate statement — please try again later.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Account Statements Save Preference section is open.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Save Preference"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: highlights the email field with guidance

test_cases.title: Opt into paperless without providing an email
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Account Statements Save Preference section is open.
steps: Check the paperless statements checkbox
Leave the Email Address field empty
Click "Save Preference"
test_cases.expected_result: Email field is highlighted with guidance and the preference is not saved.
test_cases.spec_evidence: highlights the email field with guidance

test_cases.title: Generate statement with invalid date format shows validation error
test_cases.workflow: Generate Statement (the system validates the dates and retrieves the relevant transactions)
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Account Statements page with an account selected
steps: Fill all required fields (Select account, From Date, To Date) using an invalid date format in one or both date fields
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the date format is invalid.
test_cases.spec_evidence: the system validates the dates and retrieves the relevant transactions

test_cases.title: Save preference with invalid email format
test_cases.workflow: Save Preference (the system validates the email address)
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Account Statements Save Preference form is open.
steps: Fill all required fields (Email address) with an invalid email format
Click "Save"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating invalid email format is shown and the preference is not saved.
test_cases.spec_evidence: the system validates the email address

test_cases.title: Generate statement for a single-day range (From Date equals To Date)
test_cases.workflow: Generate Statement (the system validates the dates and retrieves the relevant transactions)
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Account Statements page with an account selected
steps: Fill all required fields (Select account, From Date, To Date) with the same date for From and To
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Transactions for that single date are retrieved and displayed (statement reflects single-day transactions).
test_cases.spec_evidence: the system validates the dates and retrieves the relevant transactions

test_cases.title: Generate statement for a date range with no transactions displays appropriate message
test_cases.workflow: Generate Statement (the system validates the dates and retrieves the relevant transactions)
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Account Statements page with an account selected
steps: Fill all required fields (Select account, From Date, To Date) with a valid date range expected to contain no transactions
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: System indicates no transactions found for the selected range and provides a statement indicating zero transactions.
test_cases.spec_evidence: the system validates the dates and retrieves the relevant transactions

test_cases.title: Change password with valid current and strong matching new password
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Change Password form is visible.
steps: Fill all required fields (Current Password, New Password, Confirm New Password) with the correct current password and a new strong password that matches in both New and Confirm fields
Click "Change Password"
test_cases.expected_result: Password changed successfully and a success confirmation is displayed.

test_cases.title: Change password with incorrect current password
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Change Password form is visible.
steps: Fill all required fields (Current Password, New Password, Confirm New Password) using an incorrect current password and a valid strong new password that matches the confirm field
Click "Change Password"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicates the current password is incorrect and the password is not changed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System verifies the current password

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and the Change Password form is visible.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Change Password"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation errors highlight the appropriate fields.

test_cases.title: Send support message successfully without attachment
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Support Center Send Message page.
steps: Fill all required fields (Subject, Category, Message Body) leaving Attachment empty
Click "Send Message"
test_cases.expected_result: "Message sent successfully." is displayed together with a ticket ID

test_cases.title: Request callback with all valid inputs
test_cases.preconditions: Request Callback form is open
steps: Fill all required fields (Reason for Call, Preferred Date at or after the next business day, Preferred Time Window, Phone Number - confirm or edit to a valid phone number)
Click "Request Callback"
test_cases.expected_result: 'Callback request submitted.' is shown and an email confirmation is sent after callback request submission.

test_cases.title: Category dropdown contains expected options
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Support Center Send Message page.
steps: Open the Category dropdown
Verify the options include Account, Technical, Security, and Other
test_cases.expected_result: Category options list includes Account, Technical, Security, and Other

test_cases.title: Phone number field is pre-filled and editable
test_cases.preconditions: Request Callback form is open
steps: Observe that the Phone Number field is pre-filled with the customer's phone number
Edit the Phone Number to a different valid phone number
Fill remaining required fields (Reason for Call, Preferred Date at or after the next business day, Preferred Time Window)
Click "Request Callback"
test_cases.expected_result: 'Callback request submitted.' is shown and the updated phone number is used for the request.

test_cases.title: Submit with Message Body empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Support Center Send Message page.
steps: Fill all other required fields (Subject, Category), leave Message Body empty
Click "Send Message"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Message Body is required and inline guidance displayed
test_cases.spec_evidence: Message Body is required

test_cases.title: Upload attachment of an invalid type and attempt to send
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Support Center Send Message page.
steps: Attach a file of an invalid/unsupported type and fill all required fields (Subject, Category, Message Body)
Click "Send Message"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline guidance shown indicating the attachment type is invalid and message is not sent
test_cases.spec_evidence: Attachment types are validated

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: Request Callback form is open
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Request Callback"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation errors for the callback form are shown inline

test_cases.title: Submit with Preferred Date earlier than next business day
test_cases.preconditions: Request Callback form is open
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, set Preferred Date to today or another date earlier than the next business day
Click "Request Callback"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating the Preferred Date is not acceptable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Preferred Date must be at least the next business day

test_cases.title: Submit with Preferred Date equal to the next business day (boundary)
test_cases.preconditions: Request Callback form is open
steps: Fill all required fields (Reason for Call, Preferred Date set to the next business day, Preferred Time Window, Phone Number confirmed as valid)
Click "Request Callback"
test_cases.expected_result: 'Callback request submitted.' is shown and an email confirmation is sent.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Preferred Date must be at least the next business day

test_cases.title: Subject exceeds allowed length and is rejected
test_cases.preconditions: User is signed in and on the Support Center Send Message page.
steps: Fill all required fields with a Subject longer than the system allows and a valid Message Body
Click "Send Message"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline guidance shown indicating the subject length violation and message is not sent
test_cases.spec_evidence: Subject length is checked
